ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measure */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "parent_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measure being tracked */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group being tracked */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical summary */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being summarized */,
  "median" REAL /* Median value of the data point */,
  "iqr_lwr" REAL /* Lower bound of the interquartile range (IQR) */,
  "iqr_upr" REAL /* Upper bound of the IQR */,
  "ci95_lwr" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval (CI95) */,
  "ci95_upr" REAL /* Upper bound of the CI95 */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the data point */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_regions" (
  "city_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city-region relationship */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the city-region relationship became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_regions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being tracked */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version being tracked */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was changed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model making the prediction */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being predicted */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
